title: Immortality.
content:
It is an honorable thought,
    And makes one lift one's hat,
    As one encountered gentlefolk
    Upon a daily street,

    That we've immortal place,
    Though pyramids decay,
    And kingdoms, like the orchard,
    Flit russetly away.
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, Emily Elizabeth Dickinson delivers a powerful performance in "Immortality."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
